items.abstract: <jats:p>Access to human coaches leads to more weight loss than with access to an AI coach alone, with consumers setting higher weight loss goals, tracking their weight and food intake more frequently.</jats:p>
title: Does Access to Human Coaches Lead to More Weight Loss Than With AI Coaches Alone?

items.abstract: <jats:p>This paper examines how coalition loyalty programs enhance firms’ ability to price discriminate and shows why the optimal program size depends on market composition.</jats:p>
title: On the Value of Coalition Loyalty Programs

items.abstract: <jats:p>This paper investigates how consumer impatience affects competition and how delivery technology may reshape market structure in online retail markets.</jats:p>
title: Consumer Impatience, Technological Innovation, and Market Structure
